title: Constraint Audit: c001-c037 Against ANIMA Architecture

content.purpose: Map all 37 Living Seed constraints against ANIMA's W⊕I⊕T architecture. Classify each as: addressed-by-design, open-wall, methodology-carry-forward, or not-applicable.

classification_definitions.addressed-by-design: W⊕I⊕T architecture resolves or sidesteps this constraint
classification_definitions.open-wall: Constraint persists in ANIMA; risk still present and must be addressed
classification_definitions.not-applicable: Specific to Living Seed equation, parameters, or substrate

c001_response_weighted_gradients_unrelia.reason: c001 is about gradient proxies for beta/gamma in phi[k]=tanh(...). ANIMA has no beta/gamma scalar parameters. Its update rules are parameterized by weight tensors; gradients in ANIMA are full tensor gradients, not scalar proxies.

c002_analytical_gradient_too_weak_for_be.reason: No beta/gamma in ANIMA. Weight tensor gradients in ANIMA have normal magnitude for nn.Linear layers.

c003_no_local_proxy_for_beta_gamma.reason: The root cause (c007) was that beta/gamma coupling is global and requires a global signal. ANIMA's W state IS that global signal source: W aggregates world state across all sensory inputs and provides global context to I. The local-only wall is broken by W's role as a genuine global state.

c004_finite_diff_MI_violates_principle_I.reason: Principle II violation (external measurement) is substrate-independent. Any ANIMA experiment using an external MI evaluator to drive adaptation violates Principle II. The self-generated signal requirement applies to ANIMA.

c005_beta_gamma_MI_landscape_multiple_ma.reason: Specific to beta/gamma parameter landscape. ANIMA has a different parameter space (W, I, T weight tensors). The landscape topology is unknown and must be characterized empirically.

c006_per_cell_decomposition_destroys_per.reason: c006 arose because per-cell decomposition of global coupling destroyed the coupling mechanism. ANIMA's W⊕I⊕T decomposition is orthogonal by TYPE (State, Memory, Decision), not by cell. Each module maintains its global structure. The decomposition is architectural, not per-cell on a shared coupling parameter.

c007_beta_gamma_coupling_fundamentally_g.reason: This is the root cause behind c003 and c006. ANIMA is designed specifically to solve this: W provides the global signal that I can condition on. I's update rule receives prediction_error (global: actual - predicted), not a local cell statistic. The global coupling information flows through W -> prediction -> error -> I.

c008_multiplicative_self_referential_rat.reason: ANIMA faces an analog risk when implementing Stage 7 (hypernetwork H within I generating I's own weights). Per-step self-referential weight modification can produce exponential divergence, the ANIMA analog of bang-bang oscillation. MITIGATION: T's cycle-boundary consolidation provides natural damping. Self-modification should only apply at cycle boundaries, not per-step.
c008_multiplicative_self_referential_rat.mitigation: Apply weight updates from H only at T cycle boundaries (consolidate_to_memory trigger). This matches how internal_memory is already updated.

c009_stage3_meta_rate_must_be_external_t.reason: In Living Seed, the problem was eta trying to modify itself. In ANIMA Stage 7, H (a distinct sublayer of I) generates weights for I's update rules. H is external to the update_gate/error_gate/candidate modules it modifies — the same separation principle c009 requires is architecturally enforced by the hypernetwork pattern.

c010_5_seed_insufficient.reason: ANIMA evaluation will have its own variance profile. 5-seed validation is insufficient for any stochastic dynamical system with seed-sensitive behavior. Must characterize ANIMA's CV before setting minimum seed count.

c011_per_cell_eta_adaptation_does_not_im.reason: Living Seed specific. eta is not an ANIMA parameter. ANIMA has learning_rate in AnimaConfig but it governs consolidation_strength, not a per-step plasticity rule. The system is not a 1D ring of cells with per-cell learning rates.

c012_resp_z_derivative_tower_collapses.reason: resp_z is a Living Seed response variable. ANIMA has no resp_z or equivalent. Adaptation signals in ANIMA arise from prediction_error, world_state_norm, internal_state_norm, and phase/cycle variables.

c013_stage3_requires_different_signal_fa.reason: Living Seed specific conclusion. For ANIMA, the self-generated signal family starts fresh: prediction_error, W-I information flow, consolidation novelty, and phase-correlated statistics are all candidate signals.

c014_evaluation_protocol_CV_29pct.reason: ANIMA's CV must be characterized independently. Expected to differ significantly from Living Seed's due to more complex dynamics. First experiments should measure CV before designing validation protocol.

c015_use_n_perm_8_n_trials_6.reason: The 2x exposure protocol that reduces CV is substrate-independent methodology. Apply to ANIMA once its evaluation harness is defined.

c016_within_seed_paired_design_increases.reason: Paired design pathology is substrate-independent. Do not use within-seed paired designs for ANIMA either.

c017_extreme_K_values_increase_variance.reason: K-averaging methodology is substrate-independent. ANIMA evaluation should determine its own K range, but the principle (avoid extreme K values) likely holds.

c018_evolutionary_search_3_seed_selects_.reason: Substrate-independent. Any evolutionary search for ANIMA adaptation mechanisms must use 10+ seeds.

c019_future_search_10_plus_seeds.reason: Substrate-independent minimum for genuine improvement detection.

c020_delta_correlation_adaptation_harms_.reason: Specific to Living Seed plasticity rule signal (correlation of delta_rz with error push). ANIMA has no plasticity rule in this sense. Underlying lesson carries forward: correlation-based anti-signals can exist and must be validated empirically.

c022_one_way_eta_reduction_anti_signal.reason: Living Seed specific (eta parameter, error-push correlation signal). ANIMA does not have this parameter/signal combination.

c023_plasticity_threshold_non_binding.reason: Living Seed specific. ANIMA has novelty_threshold in consolidation (default 0.1). Whether this is binding must be characterized empirically for ANIMA.

c024_3_seed_diagnostics_insufficient_at_.reason: Substrate-independent methodological lesson. Always use paired seeds or 10+ seeds for ANIMA diagnostics.

c025_alpha_clip_bounds_non_binding.reason: alpha is a Living Seed parameter. ANIMA has no alpha. World state coherence bounds (world_coherence_max, internal_coherence_max) are the functional analogs and must be characterized separately.

c026_parameter_activity_not_binding.reason: The lesson (a parameter hitting its bound does not mean performance depends on its value) is substrate-independent and applies to all ANIMA config parameters.

c027_multi_K_protocol_required.reason: Multi-K averaging is substrate-independent variance reduction. ANIMA evaluation must determine its own K-equivalent protocol (e.g., multiple sequence lengths or cycle counts).

c028_per_cell_cosine_similarity.reason: Retracted by c030, but the underlying concern (ground truth measurement must be consistent and not rank-reversing) is substrate-independent.

c030_per_cell_and_centroid_identical_und.reason: The lesson (measurement method consistency under matched protocol) applies to ANIMA ground truth measurement design.

c031_tau_K_dependent_no_consistent_direc.reason: Living Seed tau (state update mixing coefficient). ANIMA has no direct tau analog. T's phase evolution and I's GRU-like gating serve different roles.

c034_eps_non_binding.reason: Living Seed specific parameter (eps in state update). ANIMA has no eps parameter.

c035_delta_optimal_at_boundary_memoryles.reason: This is the characterization that motivated the architecture transition. Delta=1.0 optimal because Living Seed is a MEMORYLESS signal processor — full replacement maximizes signal fidelity per step. ANIMA is specifically designed to have memory: I accumulates irreversible experience via internal_memory, W accumulates world state across cycles. The memoryless constraint is an architectural property of the 1D ring, not of computation in general. ANIMA's GRU-like gating (z gate in [0,1]) implements learned mixing, not fixed delta.

c036_divergence_anti_signal_for_delta.reason: Specific to Living Seed's per-step state-output divergence signal and delta parameter. Underlying lesson (self-generated adaptation signals must measure the property that actually determines performance) carries forward as methodology.

c037_architecture_ceiling_living_seed.reason: This constraint declares the Living Seed's ceiling. ANIMA is the new substrate started because of this ceiling. The ceiling result (6/8 frozen frame minimum, Stage 7 impossible in Living Seed) is background context for ANIMA, not a constraint on ANIMA.

key_findings: 5 constraints addressed-by-design: W as global signal source (c003, c007) and W⊕I⊕T orthogonal decomposition (c006) resolve the Living Seed's local-only wall. Hypernetwork separation (c009) resolves the self-referential meta-rate problem. ANIMA's memory architecture (c035) resolves the memoryless signal processor ceiling.
1 open wall: c008 (bang-bang oscillation risk in self-referential modifications). Mitigation exists via T cycle-boundary gating. This is the primary stability risk for Stage 7 implementation.
13 methodology constraints carry forward unchanged: seed count minimums, multi-K protocol, paired design avoidance, Principle II compliance, and evaluation consistency apply to any substrate.
18 constraints not applicable: mostly specific to beta/gamma, alpha, tau, eps, delta parameters of the Living Seed equation. These parameters do not exist in ANIMA.

Hidden methodology lesson in 'not-applicable' constraints: anti-signal detection (c020, c022, c036) and false positive susceptibility (c010, c024) are substrate-independent risks that ANIMA experiments must guard against even though the specific signals are inapplicable.
anima_specific_unknowns_not_covered_by_c: ANIMA CV profile unknown — must characterize before validation protocol can be set
T cycle boundary frequency vs consolidation frequency tradeoff unknown
W-I information flow bandwidth (can W carry enough global context to inform I's self-modification?)
Novelty threshold (0.1) for internal memory consolidation — may be binding or non-binding, not yet tested
coherence_max bounds (10.0 for both W and I) — parameter activity vs binding unknown

constraints_implied: ANIMA Stage 7 self-modification must apply at T cycle boundaries, not per-step — prevents c008-analog bang-bang instability
ANIMA validation protocol must characterize CV before setting minimum seed count — do not assume Living Seed CV=29% applies
ANIMA evaluation must guard against false positives (c010 lesson) and anti-signals (c020/c036 lesson) even though the specific Living Seed signals are not applicable
